name: Conditional with multiple branches
description: Plan-to-commands evaluation captured from production log on 2026-04-30 at 16:00:16.
user_prompt:
Convert this workflow plan to JSON commands:

1. Add a Conditional node named "Check Critical Inventory".
   - Purpose: Evaluate whether the workflow variable ${inventory_count} is below the critical threshold.
   - Configuration:
     - conditionType: comparison
     - leftValue: ${inventory_count}
     - operator: less than
     - rightValue: 10
   - Behavior:
     - pass path = inventory_count < 10
     - fail path = inventory_count >= 10

2. On the pass path from "Check Critical Inventory", add a Set Variable node named "Set Urgent Email Subject".
   - Purpose: Create a simple variable for the email subject because Alert emailSubject must reference a simple variable.
   - Configuration:
     - Set variable subject_urgent
     - mode: direct value
     - value: URGENT: Inventory is critically low

3. Connect "Set Urgent Email Subject" to a Set Variable node named "Set Urgent Email Message".
   - Purpose: Create a simple variable for the email body because Alert messageTemplate must reference a simple variable.
   - Configuration:
     - Set variable message_urgent
     - mode: expression
     - expression: f"Inventory count is {inventory_count}, which is below the critical threshold of 10. Immediate attention is required."

4. Connect "Set Urgent Email Message" to an Alert node named "Send Urgent Inventory Email".
   - Purpose: Send an urgent email when inventory_count is below 10.
   - Configuration:
     - alertType: Email
     - recipients: manager@acme.com
     - emailSubject: ${subject_urgent}
     - messageTemplate: ${message_urgent}
     - reasonable defaults: no attachment, standard priority/default sender settings

5. On the fail path from "Check Critical Inventory", add a second Conditional node named "Check Warning Inventory".
   - Purpose: Determine whether the inventory count falls in the warning range.
   - Configuration:
     - conditionType: comparison
     - leftValue: ${inventory_count}
     - operator: less than or equals
     - rightValue: 50
   - Behavior:
     - Because this node is only reached when inventory_count is already >= 10, the pass path effectively means 10 <= inventory_count <= 50.
     - fail path = inventory_count > 50

6. On the pass path from "Check Warning Inventory", add a Set Variable node named "Set Warning Email Subject".
   - Purpose: Create a simple variable for the warning email subject.
   - Configuration:
     - Set variable subject_warning
     - mode: direct value
     - value: Warning: Inventory is running low

7. Connect "Set Warning Email Subject" to a Set Variable node named "Set Warning Email Message".
   - Purpose: Create a simple variable for the warning email body.
   - Configuration:
     - Set variable message_warning
     - mode: expression
     - expression: f"Inventory count is {inventory_count}, which is in the warning range between 10 and 50. Please review and replenish soon."

8. Connect "Set Warning Email Message" to an Alert node named "Send Warning Inventory Email".
   - Purpose: Send a warning email when inventory_count is between 10 and 50 inclusive.
   - Configuration:
     - alertType: Email
     - recipients: manager@acme.com
     - emailSubject: ${subject_warning}
     - messageTemplate: ${message_warning}
     - reasonable defaults: no attachment, standard priority/default sender settings

9. Leave the fail path from "Check Warning Inventory" unconnected so that when inventory_count > 50, the workflow does nothing and ends naturally.

10. Connections summary:
   - "Check Critical Inventory" pass -> "Set Urgent Email Subject"
   - "Set Urgent Email Subject" -> "Set Urgent Email Message"
   - "Set Urgent Email Message" -> "Send Urgent Inventory Email"
   - "Check Critical Inventory" fail -> "Check Warning Inventory"
   - "Check Warning Inventory" pass -> "Set Warning Email Subject"
   - "Set Warning Email Subject" -> "Set Warning Email Message"
   - "Set Warning Email Message" -> "Send Warning Inventory Email"
   - "Check Warning Inventory" fail -> no connection
